LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-05-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DONNA WONG'S MOTION TO SEAL OR REDACT REFERENCES TO DEFENDANT WONGS ADDRESS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DONNA WONG'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO SEAL OR REDACT REFERENCES TO DEFENDANT WONG'S ADDRESSES" IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL CONTACT DEFENSE COUNSEL ABOUT THE NEED FOR DEFENSE COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THE NECESSARY FINDINGS THE COURT MUST MAKE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.550(D). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-28-2021 - *** CASE IS DISMISSED. *** NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. JACK H. POGOSIAN, COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF FOR JUL-09-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Or Redact References To Defendant Wongs Address
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. (Tel: 415-851-5297) specially appearing for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DONNA WONG's Motion To Seal Or Redact References To Defendant Wongs Address.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Donna Wong's unopposed "motion to seal or redact references to defendant Wong's addresses" is granted.

The Court will contact defense counsel about the need for defense counsel to submit a proposed order which states the necessary findings the Court must make pursuant to California Rule of Court 2.550(d).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2021 Set For Trial On Jun-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
